name: @vellora/benchmarks
description: Reproducible, version-pinned HTML->PDF benchmark suite (NOT published; competitor deps live here so they never touch the runtime graph of any vellora package).

comment-non-npm-tools._note: Gotenberg and WeasyPrint are NOT npm packages. Their pinned versions are documented here and consumed by config.mjs / the adapters. They are installed out-of-band (Docker image / pip) by CI; see README.md.

weasyprint.mode: in-process in a warm long-lived worker
